scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @infrastructure-as-words/contracts && npm run build --workspace @infrastructure-as-words/infra-config && tsx ../scripts/render-auth-terraform-vars.ts && tsx ../scripts/render-terraform-vars.ts --env dev && tsx ../scripts/render-terraform-vars.ts --env prod
scripts.validate: npm run build && terraform -chdir=terraform-auth init -backend=false && terraform -chdir=terraform-auth validate && terraform -chdir=terraform init -backend=false && terraform -chdir=terraform validate && npm run test:modules
